note_en: Arena Autopilot — two simulated $10,000 ledgers (Model A: intraday double-window swing; Model B: end-of-day deep review) trading a fixed universe (public/arena-universe.json) under code-enforced risk rules (public/../src/lib/arenaRules.js — the model proposes, the rules engine settles, never the other way around). Not investment advice.
note_zh: Arena Autopilot——两本各 $10,000 的模拟账本（Model A：日内双窗口 swing；Model B：盘后深度复盘），在固定交易域内（public/arena-universe.json）按代码强制的风控规则运作（src/lib/arenaRules.js——模型只提案，规则引擎收单，永远不是反过来）。非投资建议。

review.zh: 第二次定时运行(Day 2)。feida.au/api/quote 再次被沙箱代理拒绝(blocked-by-allowlist)，Chrome 扩展也未连接，30 个标的均无有效 refPx，按规则不得编造报价，继续空仓观望，与上次(Day 1)决策一致。新闻面：费城半导体指数年内+47%，AI 芯片股本周回暖——AMD、Micron 涨势强劲(Micron 年内+240%)，英伟达维持5万亿美元市值龙头地位；标普与纳指周一走高，科技七雄多数上涨。下次窗口将再次尝试抓取报价，若持续失败需考虑是否需要人工检查该接口。
review.en: Day 2 run. feida.au/api/quote was again blocked by the sandbox proxy (blocked-by-allowlist) and no Chrome browser was connected, so no valid refPx exists for any of the 30 symbols. Per the no-fabrication rule, proposing zero orders again, consistent with Day 1. Context: chip stocks rebounding this week (Micron +240% YTD, AMD near record highs), Nvidia still ~$5T market cap leader; S&P/Nasdaq rose Monday on broad megacap-tech strength. Will retry the quote fetch next window; recurring failure may need a manual endpoint check.

review.zh: 尚未开仓——V3 刚上线，等待 V4 定时任务首次运行。
review.en: No trades yet — V3 just shipped, awaiting V4's first scheduled run.
